subcodes.first_line: We know a violator, Abdu'l-Baha says, as we know a donkey when we see him, because violation of the Covenant, he says has a pungent odor
subcodes.subjects: @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @station; mission; authority of Abdu'l-Baha, @mystery of the great reversal, @quotation from or interpretation of the Bible
